lines: What'd you say?
Ham is safe?
That's amazing!
Where is he?
Huh? What do you mean you don't know?
Erm... okay I guess.
Well, I guess I can go back to building things now!
Say, how about I make you a car, so that you can go visit Ham more often for me?
I'm going to need 3 pieces of scrap metal.
Bring me more scrap metal, and let's build this car!
Hey, I'm Duf!
I used to love tinkering with things, but...
My brother Ham's been missing and I'm worried sick.
Ham and I used to be called the engineers of the rat society.
I loved working on engines, and he loved tinkering with gears!
But now he's gone, and I don't even know where he would have gone off to...
Especially given he's become very lazy...
Can you help me find him?
This key is the last thing I have of his. Maybe it'll help you find him.
Ham used to love tinkering with gears...
